message.content:
@startuml
title Scheduled Events

actor "Recording Staff" as RS
actor "Coach" as Coach
boundary "IP/Mobile Cams" as Cams
boundary "Consumer Apps" as ConsumerApps
boundary "Security Gateway" as SecGW
control "Control Domain\n(win10/linux)" as CD
boundary "Streaming Service\n(encoder)" as SS
entity "Media\n(mediaID)" as Media
boundary "Transfer Service" as TS

ConsumerApps -> SecGW : authenticate(ID)
SecGW --> ConsumerApps : return(token)

CD -> SS : host(sources{endpoints})

Cams -> CD : register(endpoint)
ConsumerApps -> CD : register(token, priority)

RS -> CD : createEvent(configuration{description, sources, consumers{priorities}})
CD --> CD : create(newEvent)

RS -> CD : start(newEvent)
CD -> SS : encode()
CD --> ConsumerApps : notify(recording)

RS -> CD : stop(newEvent)
CD -> SS : saveAs(mediaID)
SS -> Media : save(mediaID)

CD -> TS : host(mediaID, consumers{token, priority})
CD --> ConsumerApps : notify(newMediaAvailable, mediaID, transferServiceEndpoint)

alt [auto-download enabled]
    ConsumerApps -> TS : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
    TS --> ConsumerApps : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
else [manual-download enabled]
    Coach -> ConsumerApps : showMedia(token)
    ConsumerApps -> TS : fetchMedia(token, mediaID)
    TS --> ConsumerApps : returnByPriority(mediaStream)
end

@enduml
